productDisplayName: Maxima Men White Dial Scuba Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a sporty style statement with this Scuba watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Round stainless steel case with blue and red bezel Dial style: White dial with luminous indicies and hands Features: Date aperture at 3 hour mark with magnifying window on glass Strap stype: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 9 mm
